title: symbol-valued extra prop — both paths produce declared-only output
description: Extra `sym: Symbol("x")` is silently dropped by JSON.stringify per ECMAScript spec (symbol-valued own props are non-enumerable for JSON purposes). Unsafe path: prepareForJson preserves it, JSON.stringify drops it. Safe path: strip removes it before stringify. Same observable, different mechanism — document the lossy round-trip in both paths.
